text_block_list.text:
With a long day's work behind me, I allow my mind to wander a bit.
As it would turn out, I haven't been able to forget about Manhattan
Cafe.
choice_data_list: I wonder if she's out there again...

text_block_list.text:
I make to leave my room and head for the track, not knowing who, or
what, I will find.
Click, clack.

The door doesn't budge. No matter how much I twist and turn the
knob, it refuses to open.
choice_data_list: (Is someone pushing on the other side?)

text_block_list.text:
Knowing that shouldn't be the case, I tense up my shoulder and ram
the door. It gives way this time, and on the other side I'm greeted
by...
No one.

I convince myself that the door fixture itself is to blame, and make my
way down to the track without much of a second thought.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I've been running after you... ever since I was little... Why... can't I
ever catch up?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...How are you able to accelerate through corners like that?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
How... do you maintain that form? It's as elegant as willow branches
swaying in the breeze.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...You're just... so incredible. But even so... I'm definitely going to
catch up with you someday...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...So I'm going to keep running. And running... No matter how long it
takes...

Manhattan Cafe's silhouette melts into the shadowy reaches of the
track. She soon re-emerges onto the final straightaway with an
incredible burst of speed.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Haaah!

Her jet-black hair does well to keep her concealed in the murky
darkness, but she's able to make her presence known with an
explosion of speed.
What do you think? That ability of hers is quite impressive, is it not?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, surprised to see me? I'm sure your blood pressure spiked a fair
bit just now. I'd love to get a pulse reading, but there are other
matters at hand.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I assume that you are one of the new trainers looking for someone to
scout. Or perhaps...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You are a trespassing rascal, spying on Umamusume late at night. I
would be obligated to report you, of course.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Well that's good to hear. Caught your attention, has she?
choice_data_list: I'm a little curious, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? I wonder what the source of that curiosity could be. Is it her
abilities, or have you noticed some manner of strange phenomena
that seemingly stem from her?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No matter, I suppose. You'd best speak with her directly rather than
gawk from afar. Time is finite, after all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And while I'd be interested in observing how she chooses to engage
with you, I'm afraid I must get back to my research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ah, but allow me to impart one piece of advice.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Be assertive in your proposal. You'll find that she can be surprisingly
compliant.
What was that all about?

"Strange phenomena," though. Has she also experienced such after
interacting with Manhattan Cafe?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hm? Yes... it is.
choice_data_list: Do you always train this late?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. I can see her better... at night.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Do you... have any business with me?
choice_data_list:
It seemed like you were talking with someone
just now.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: With my friend.
I glance around the empty track, unable to spot anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You won't be able to see her... No one can, no matter how hard they
look...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: So please... don't concern yourself with it. You really... shouldn't.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm the only one... who ever notices her. She... she remains far away,
even from me...
choice_data_list: So you have a friend that only you can see?
So you have a friend that only you can see?

text_block_list.text:
I take her word for it, but what could that possibly mean? A "friend"
that only she can see?
Is she talking about something like a ghost?
InCorRecT

No one is around but the two of us. I can't claim to have heard a
voice, but my mind has somehow been infiltrated with an answer to
my query.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Do you find me... "creepy"?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Nothing... Forget I asked.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Excuse me.
Manhattan Cafe gives me a slight bow, and walks off.

I cannot deny that I do seem to be experiencing strange phenomena.
Could it have something to do with this "friend" of hers?

There's certainly a lot on my mind, but more than anything, I cannot
stop thinking about her amazing running earlier.
